economic_notes: Nation holds a large CIBC Wood Gundy investment portfolio (settlement capital fund) valued at $26,145,161 market value. Smith's Landing Development Corporation is a controlled entity accounted for by modified equity method with no revenues or net earnings in 2020. Management fees on investment portfolio were $263,791. $1,000,000 transferred annually from settlement fund to general operations.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Large non-financial investment portfolio (settlement capital fund) of $26.1M at market value held at CIBC Wood Gundy — this is classified as a non-financial asset and represents the dominant portion of accumulated surplus. The portfolio declined by ~$2M in unrealized gains during the year. Smith's Landing Development Corporation is accounted for by modified equity method (1 GBE). No schedule of remuneration was included in the financial statements. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($1,693,251) + Akaitcho Territory Government ($61,017) + Alberta Government ($230,000) + FNDF ($338,834) + COVID-19 ISC ($125,000) + other ISC-sourced programs; OSR derived accordingly. Total expenses include amortization of $112,883 in addition to program expenditures of $3,806,739. COVID-19 noted as significant event. Two contingent liabilities disclosed but amounts not determinable.
